section: UNITED STATES HOUSE OF REPRESENTATIVES - Periodic Transaction Report
free_text:
**UNITED STATES HOUSE OF REPRESENTATIVES — Periodic Transaction Report**

Stamped: **HAND DELIVERED**, 2025 MAR -6 AM 11:00 (Legislative Resource Center / U.S. House of Representatives — For Official Use Only)

- **NAME:** Rohit Khanna
- **Status:** [X] Member of the U.S. House of Representatives
- **State:** CA  **District:** 17
- File an original and 2 copies
- [ ] Officer or Employee (Employing Office: ____; File an original and 1 copy)
- **OFFICE TELEPHONE:** 202-225-2631
- **Did you purchase any shares that were allocated as a part of an Initial Public Offering?** [ ] Yes  [X] No
- Please indicate whether this is an initial report or an amended report: [X] **Initial Report**  [ ] Amendment
- Date of Report Being Amended: (blank)
- A $200 penalty shall be assessed against anyone who files more than 30 days late.

The transaction grid on this page contains only the greyed printed **Example** row (Mega Corp. Common Stock, JT, Sale, date 02/05/2015, notification 03/07/2015, amount B $15,001-$50,000), which is ignored. The first data cell reads **"Please see the attached"** — actual transactions follow on the attached pages.
